rule_details.description: Liveness and readiness probes are now enabled by default in Spring Boot 4
Usage of @Aspect requires spring-boot-starter-aspectj (renamed from spring-boot-starter-aop) in Spring Boot 4
spring-boot-starter-batch now uses in-memory mode; use spring-boot-starter-batch-jdbc for database
BootstrapRegistry moved from org.springframework.boot to org.springframework.boot.bootstrap
BootstrapContext moved from org.springframework.boot to org.springframework.boot.bootstrap
EnvironmentPostProcessor moved from org.springframework.boot.env to org.springframework.boot
Embedded executable uber jar launch scripts have been removed in Spring Boot 4.
Classic uber-jar loader removed in Spring Boot 4; remove loaderImplementation CLASSIC config
Classic uber-jar loader removed in Spring Boot 4; remove Gradle loaderImplementation config
CycloneDX Gradle plugin minimum version is 3.0.0 for Spring Boot 4
Use spring-boot-properties-migrator to assist with renamed/removed configuration properties.
PropertyMapper.alwaysApplyingWhenNonNull() removed in Spring Boot 4
Configuration properties were renamed or removed in Spring Boot 4; update application.properties/application.yml
org.elasticsearch.client:elasticsearch-rest-client removed; Spring Boot 4 auto-configures Rest5Client from co.elastic.clients:elasticsearch-java
org.elasticsearch.client:elasticsearch-rest-client-sniffer removed; built-in sniffer support is now in co.elastic.clients:elasticsearch-java
RestClientBuilderCustomizer replaced by Rest5ClientBuilderCustomizer for Elasticsearch Rest5Client configuration
Spring Boot 4.0 requires Java 17+, Spring Framework 7.x, and Jakarta EE 11.
Undertow support has been removed from Spring Boot 4; it is not Servlet 6.1 compatible.
Spring Pulsar Reactive auto-configuration has been removed from Spring Boot 4.
Spring Session Hazelcast support has been removed from Spring Boot 4.
Spring Session MongoDB support has been removed from Spring Boot 4.
Flyway now requires the spring-boot-starter-flyway starter instead of a direct dependency.
Liquibase now requires the spring-boot-starter-liquibase starter instead of a direct dependency.
spring-boot-starter renamed to spring-boot-starter-classic in Spring Boot 4.
spring-boot-starter-aop renamed to spring-boot-starter-aspectj in Spring Boot 4
Spring Boot 4 removed managed dependency for Spring Retry; explicit version now required
spring-authorization-server.version property no longer works in Spring Boot 4
DevTools Live Reload disabled by default in Spring Boot 4
ElasticsearchClient's underlying low-level client changed from RestClient to Rest5Client in Spring Boot 4
ReactiveElasticsearchClient's underlying low-level client changed from RestClient to Rest5Client in Spring Boot 4
Spring Boot 4 integrates GraphQL via spring-boot-graphql with root package org.springframework.boot.graphql; direct use of org.springframework.graphql should be reviewed
Direct spring-graphql-test dependency should be replaced by spring-boot-starter-graphql-test in Spring Boot 4
hibernate-jpamodelgen replaced by hibernate-processor in Spring Boot 4 dependency management
hibernate-proxool is no longer published in Spring Boot 4
hibernate-vibur is no longer published in Spring Boot 4
Jackson 3 uses new package names: com.fasterxml.jackson moved to tools.jackson
Jackson 2 group ID com.fasterxml.jackson.core replaced by tools.jackson in Jackson 3
Jackson 2 group ID com.fasterxml.jackson.core replaced by tools.jackson in Jackson 3
JsonObjectSerializer renamed to ObjectValueSerializer in Spring Boot 4
JsonValueDeserializer renamed to ObjectValueDeserializer in Spring Boot 4
Jackson2ObjectMapperBuilderCustomizer renamed to JsonMapperBuilderCustomizer in Spring Boot 4
@JsonComponent renamed to @JacksonComponent in Spring Boot 4
@JsonMixin renamed to @JacksonMixin in Spring Boot 4
spring.jackson.read.* properties moved to spring.jackson.json.read in Spring Boot 4
spring.jackson.write.* properties moved to spring.jackson.json.write in Spring Boot 4
spring.jackson.parser.* properties replaced by spring.jackson.json.read in Spring Boot 4
Jackson module auto-detection now enabled by default in Spring Boot 4
spring.jackson.use-jackson2-defaults is a temporary compatibility property in Spring Boot 4
spring-boot-jackson2 is a deprecated compatibility module in Spring Boot 4
spring.jackson2.* properties indicate use of the deprecated Jackson 2 compatibility module in Spring Boot 4
Logback default charset harmonized to UTF-8 in Spring Boot 4
StreamBuilderFactoryBeanCustomizer removed; replaced by StreamsBuilderFactoryBeanConfigurer
spring.kafka.retry.topic.backoff.random removed; replaced by spring.kafka.retry.topic.backoff.jitter
RabbitRetryTemplateCustomizer removed; replaced by dedicated customizer interfaces
MongoDB connection properties renamed from spring.data.mongodb to spring.mongodb in Spring Boot 4
MongoDB management properties renamed to use mongodb instead of mongo in Spring Boot 4
Spring Data MongoDB no longer provides defaults for UUID and BigDecimal representations in Spring Boot 4
spring.data.mongodb.additional-hosts was renamed to spring.mongodb.additional-hosts in Spring Boot 4
spring.data.mongodb.authentication-database was renamed to spring.mongodb.authentication-database in Spring Boot 4
spring.data.mongodb.password was renamed to spring.mongodb.password in Spring Boot 4
spring.data.mongodb.protocol was renamed to spring.mongodb.protocol in Spring Boot 4
spring.data.mongodb.replica-set-name was renamed to spring.mongodb.replica-set-name in Spring Boot 4
spring.data.mongodb.auto-index-creation remains unchanged in Spring Boot 4 but requires Spring Data MongoDB
spring.data.mongodb.field-naming-strategy remains unchanged in Spring Boot 4 but requires Spring Data MongoDB
spring.data.mongodb.gridfs.bucket remains unchanged in Spring Boot 4 but requires Spring Data MongoDB
spring.data.mongodb.repositories.type remains unchanged in Spring Boot 4 but requires Spring Data MongoDB
Spring's @Nullable replaced by JSpecify nullability annotations in Spring Boot 4
Spring's @NonNull replaced by JSpecify nullability annotations in Spring Boot 4
EntityScan annotation relocated to org.springframework.boot.persistence.autoconfigure in Spring Boot 4
spring.dao.exceptiontranslation.enabled property replaced by spring.persistence.exceptiontranslation.enabled
spring-boot-starter-oauth2-authorization-server renamed to spring-boot-starter-security-oauth2-authorization-server.
spring-boot-starter-oauth2-client renamed to spring-boot-starter-security-oauth2-client.
spring-boot-starter-oauth2-resource-server renamed to spring-boot-starter-security-oauth2-resource-server.
spring-boot-starter-tomcat must be replaced with spring-boot-starter-tomcat-runtime for WAR file deployments to Tomcat
Spring Session Data Redis properties renamed from spring.session.redis to spring.session.data.redis
Spring Session MongoDB properties renamed from spring.session.mongodb to spring.session.data.mongodb
Spring Boot's Spock integration has been removed as Spock does not yet support Groovy 5.
spring-security-test now requires spring-boot-starter-security-test in Spring Boot 4.
@WithMockUser now requires spring-boot-starter-security-test to operate properly in Spring Boot 4.
@WithUserDetails now requires spring-boot-starter-security-test to operate properly in Spring Boot 4.
spring-boot-starter-test renamed to spring-boot-starter-test-classic in Spring Boot 4.
MockitoTestExecutionListener removed; use MockitoExtension from Mockito directly
@SpringBootTest no longer provides MockMVC; @AutoConfigureMockMvc now required
@SpringBootTest no longer auto-configures WebClient or TestRestTemplate beans
TestRestTemplate relocated to org.springframework.boot.resttestclient package
@PropertyMapping relocated from test.autoconfigure.properties to test.context
PropertyMapping.Skip enum relocated to org.springframework.boot.test.context
@MockBean removed; replaced by Spring Framework's @MockitoBean
@SpyBean removed; replaced by Spring Framework's @MockitoSpyBean
spring-boot-starter-web renamed to spring-boot-starter-webmvc in Spring Boot 4.
spring-boot-starter-web-services renamed to spring-boot-starter-webservices in Spring Boot 4.
Spring Boot 4 adds /fonts/** to PathRequest.toStaticResources() common static locations
HttpMessageConverters deprecated in Spring Boot 4; use ClientHttpMessageConvertersCustomizer or ServerHttpMessageConvertersCustomizer
server.forward-headers-strategy no longer has effect when deploying a war to an external container
Jersey 4.0 does not yet support Jackson 3; use spring-boot-jackson2 for JSON processing with Jersey
